title: Employee number setup question
summaryBody: We want to be able to track how many employees a company has during setup so we can measure our onboarding for micro plus and small business vs our traditional cohort.
detailBody: We want to be able to track how many employees a company has during setup so we can measure our onboarding for micro plus and small business vs our traditional cohort.
